name: go-service
description: Steering for a stdlib-first Go service: testing bar and verify conventions.

files.content:
# Project steering — {{TITLE}}

Go service. Stdlib-first; every dependency is justified in design.md.

# Testing standard

- Every builder task carries a runnable `verify` (e.g. `go test ./... -race`).
- Tests are deterministic: inject the clock, never sleep on wall time.
- `make ci` (build + vet + race tests) must pass before a task completes.
